localization.role: single SDK-construction seam to override per backend
4 sites resolving model string — Bedrock translation seam
public model IDs to translate to Bedrock IDs

constraints.claim: get_client() is the only SDK-construction point; overriding it reuses the full completion pipeline
AsyncAnthropicBedrock exposes the same messages.create/stream surface as AsyncAnthropic, so subclassing is viable
Model string is resolved at 4 distinct call sites; all must route through Bedrock ID translation or calls 404
Repo already has a parrot.conf->env->boto-chain AWS credential pattern to mirror
New backends are registered by adding keys to SUPPORTED_CLIENTS, ideally via the lazy-loader pattern for optional deps
AnthropicAWS / aws_workspace_id is the least-verified part of the source; exact SDK class name and async variant unconfirmed in repo

hypothesis.statement: Add two thin AnthropicClient subclasses (AnthropicBedrockClient, AnthropicAWSClient) that override only __init__ (credential intake) and get_client() (SDK selection), plus a Bedrock model-ID translation layer, registered in LLMFactory behind lazy loaders for an optional [anthropic-aws] extra.

unknowns.question: Class topology: two subclasses vs. one client with a backend= switch?
unknowns.user_answer: One AnthropicClient class with backend=direct|bedrock|aws. get_client() is the factory that instantiates a composable backend object (including the current/direct SDK) based on backend. Reduced shared code in the main class, single class for talking to Claude.

unknowns.question: Bedrock model-ID translation: static map, region inference-profile prefix, pass-through of pre-formatted IDs, or all three?
Is the AnthropicAWS/aws_workspace_id path in scope now, or Bedrock-first with AWS-workspace as a follow-up?
unknowns.user_answer: Both backends in this feature; verify AnthropicAWS/AsyncAnthropicAWS class + aws_workspace_id param against the installed anthropic[aws] SDK during implementation.

unknowns.question: Packaging: core deps or an optional ai-parrot[anthropic-aws] extra behind lazy imports?
unknowns.user_answer: Fold anthropic[aws]/boto into the existing [anthropic] extra; keep lazy imports in get_client().

recommended_next_command.rationale: Localization is high-confidence and the design is a well-bounded subclass + factory wiring; once the 4 design forks are decided, a spec can be written directly.
